feed.title: SAP Community - SAP Business One
feed.subtitle: SAP Business One Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: SAP B1 WEB CLIENT
entry.content: When I open web clinet, I am prompted that sapui is out of date, as shown in the picture. What should I do to access web clinet normally

entry.title: T Code for Closing Banking Payments
entry.content:
Hi All Programmers

Please help advise if you know SAP Business One is using T Code for closing Banking Payments against Invoices?

 

Kedalene Chong

entry.title: Deposit' to 'Bill'
entry.content:
Dear SAP Community

I hope this message finds you well

When I enter from 'Deposit' to 'Bill' and preview the voucher, "it says no voucher is found."

Do you know why this might be the case?

I want to check the journal entry for Notes

BOE Receivable xxx / Accounts Receivable xxx.

What settings should I look at?"

Thank you for your time and assistance. I look forward to your reply.

Best regards,

entry.title: Unit price is not comming from Purchase Blanket Agreement in GRPO screen
entry.content:
Hello All,

I am encountering an issue while generating a GRPO from a Purchase Blanket Agreement. Although the unit price is specified for the line item in the Blanket Agreement, the unit price field appears blank in the GRPO when using the "Copy To" button.

Please give me some suggestion about how to fetch the unit price.

entry.title: B1 Linking Orders with Purchase Orders and Notifications for Changes or Cancellations in PO
entry.content:
Hello everyone,

We are looking for a solution in SAP Business One to link orders to purchase orders after the fact. The standard process involves setting a checkmark in the "Logistics" tab of the relevant purchase order under "Procure non-stock items" to start the process.

However, we have another issue: When changes are made to the purchase order or when the entire purchase order is canceled, these changes are only visible in the order if you explicitly check the linking plan or the sales order. However, there is no way to get a notification in the purchase order itself when a change or cancellation occurs in the purchase order.

Is there any solution or workaround to ensure that such changes are directly reflected in the order with a notification?

We would appreciate any assistance or suggestions.

Thank you in advance!

entry.title: Item Master Data - Unit Price Field Missing
entry.content:
SAP Business One 10 But we are unable to insert and price amount in Item Master Data. Price Unit Field and Price List Field are not displayed for us to insert our price. Can anyone help find the solution to this problem?

We use US Simple COA (chart of account). Please see the screen for the missing fields:

entry.title: To access DI API while opening SAP Business One, which method should I use?
entry.content:
I'm trying to create an Add-On with C# for SAP Business One.

I've known that if the Add-On executed without SAP Application opening, I need to manually set company information to connect to the database. 

But if SAP Application is opening, I've known that we can use the connection from UI API and set it to DI API.

I've known 2 methods of it but not sure which method to be used and why it's more efficient.

Method 1

 

SAPbobsCOM.Company oCompany = new SAPbobsCOM.Company();
string cookie = oCompany.GetContextCookie();
string connectionContext = oApp.Company.GetConnectionContext(cookie);
oCompany.SetSboLoginContext(connectionContext);
oCompany.Connect();

 

Method 2

 

SAPbobsCOM.Company oCompany = (SAPbobsCOM.Company)oApp.Company.GetDICompany();

 

I've found that Method 2 is easier but not sure if there is any limitations or cautions on it.

Please enlighten me. Thanks in advance.

entry.title: Inquiry Regarding Depreciation Area Settings
entry.content:
Dear SAP Support

I am writing to inquire about the depreciation area settings.

For tangible assets, we use the indirect method, while for intangible assets, we apply the direct method. However, as only one primary depreciation area can be designated, it is mandatory to assign the primary depreciation area set for the indirect method in the master data of fixed assets for intangible assets.

Is there a way to exclude this setting, or alternatively, to calculate depreciation for intangible assets using the direct method?

Thank you for your attention to this matter. I look forward to your guidance.

Best regards

entry.title: How to link field to other table in PLD in SAP Business One
entry.content:
Hello,

I have an UDF in ORDR table with the name of trade manager (aka ORDR.U_TrdM).

I have an user defined table "TRDM" with long list of trade manager's names and phone numbers.

How in PLD can I link TRDM.Phone to ORDR.U_TrdM and show the phone number of this specific trade manager? ORDR.U_TrdM field contains is exactly same value as TRDM.Name (I mean the name of the trades in ORDR is exactly the same name as in the TRDM table)

I have SAP HANA FP2108 version

Thank you in advance,

Marina

entry.title: ERROR: Failed to send AR Invoice Update the exchange rate
entry.content:
We are preparing for a large physical sale event in London from April 24th to 27th and need some assistance in ensuring that all sales process correctly through Shopify while also being able to identify sales item vs usual item.
Last year, we processed sales through the Shopify UK Point of Sale (POS) channel and tagged sale items so we could separate transactions at the end of the day. Given that we have more time to prepare this year, we created a separate POS "sale" channel in Shopify specifically for this event. This sales channel is also linked to an API following the same logic as  both API UK 6 Silver Place - POS Orders 
We have recently duplicated our POS api's in the UK to be able to process orders from multiple shopify location. Even though the API's are exact duplicated of our current connection in terms of logic, we get the below error: 
 
ERROR: Failed to send AR Invoice (ID: 11585479049602/Number: CO29046) to SAP: Update the exchange rate
 
This connection has 3 differences to our current ones: 

 
1.The GL account is the sales Revenue which is 400005 - Sales revenue Pop-ups UK.
2.  The warehouse code to be 03 rather than 02
3. The location is linked to 103733657986 (see attached) on shopify, this is our new Pop up location. 
 
I've cross checked multiple times and the changes made have been cross checked and everything seems to be set as it should be. 
 
The payload that failed can be found below, thank you in advance for your help!
 
{
  "U_PTA_order_id": 11585479049602,
  "U_Magento_WebId": 11585479049602,
  "NumAtCard": "CO29046",
  "TotalDiscount": 0,
  "DocTotal": 4,
  "DocCur": "GBP",
  "CardCode": "CNL254995",
  "DocDate": "2025-03-10",
  "DocDueDate": "2025-03-10",
  "ShippingMethod": "8",
  "JournalMemo": "POS Invoice %s Payment Method: %s",
  "Comments": "POS Invoice %s Payment Method: %s",
  "TotalDiscountSC": 0,
  "paymentMethods": "Credit Card",
  "customer": {
    "CardName": " ",
    "CardType": "C",
    "GroupCode": "105",
    "CompanyPrivate": "cCompany",
    "Series": "69",
    "Phone1": "",
    "EmailAddress": "l@p.nl",
    "Address": "",
    "City": null,
    "County": null,
    "Country": null,
    "ZipCode": null,
    "MailAddress": null,
    "MailCity": null,
    "MailCounty": null,
    "MailCountry": null,
    "MailZipCode": null,
    "PriceListNum": "9"
  },
  "DocumentLines": [
    {
      "ItemCode": "PA-AW23-5-O-CLOCK-L-001",
      "Quantity": 1,
      "Price": 3.3333,
      "AccountCode": "140100",
      "GOGSAccountCode": "400005",
      "WarehouseCode": "03",
      "TaxCode": "O1"
    }
  ]

entry.title: Reporte para Cobranza
entry.content: Quiero saber como hacer un query en el que pueda ver todos mis clientes cuanto me deben, cuando fue su ultimo pago y cuanto pago esa ultima vez. me pidieron este reporte por que dan credito y quieren saber cuales clientes dejan de pagar.

entry.title: Page Footer Supress Does Not Work Properly
entry.content:
This is a problem I've had since 2011 at the beginning of Crystal Reports, and it still occurs today in the 2020 SP4/P4 version (14 year of problem).

When a page footer is defined and suppressed without formula, the detail takes advantage of the entire sheet with the records.

When it is suppressed via formula, it does not take over the space.

SAP Crystal Reports 

See code Archive RPT example 

Rgs

Fabio

SAP 10 FP2502 / SQL SERVER 2019 / SAP HANA

entry.title: Inquiry Financial Report Templates Settings
entry.content:
Dear SAP Support

I am writing to inquire about the Financial Report Templates Settings

To Change the criteria used for generating standard accounts in the income statement template, what steps should be taken?

Capital is not part of the income accounts, but it is currently included, so i would like to adjust this criterion.

Below attachment

Thank you for your attention to this matter. I look forward to your guidance.

Best regards

entry.title: SAP Business One SDK - LoadFromDataSource(), FlushToDataSource(), how to store data back to UDT?
entry.content:
I've created my own User-defined table and use it in my editable matrix sending data back and forth to DBDataSource with LoadFromDataSource() and FlushToDataSource()

The question is, to store data, including insert, update and delete, back to UDT, do I need to manually loop over rows in the matrix, then run .Update(), .Add() or .Remove() myself or is there a way to manage it automatically?

I'm stuck at FlushToDataSource() after clicked on a Update button and ChatGPT taught me to manually set the data back, but I don't think it's an efficient way and tried to find other ways in UI and DI manual but not found anything.

Here is my code

if (pVal.ItemUID == "1" && pVal.FormMode == (int)SAPbouiCOM.BoFormMode.fm_UPDATE_MODE && pVal.EventType == SAPbouiCOM.BoEventTypes.et_ITEM_PRESSED && pVal.BeforeAction == true)
{
    SAPbouiCOM.Form oForm = oApp.Forms.Item(pVal.FormUID);
    SAPbouiCOM.Matrix oMatrix = (SAPbouiCOM.Matrix)oForm.Items.Item("matrix").Specific;
                        
    oMatrix.FlushToDataSource();

    SAPbouiCOM.DBDataSource oDBDataSource = oForm.DataSources.DBDataSources.Item("@myUDT");
                        
    ...here is where I'm stuck.

}

entry.title: Set G/L Accounts by in the latest SAP Business One release.
entry.content:
Greetings Community,

I'm Struggling to find the "Set G/L Accounts by" as it is on TB1100_EN_Col10 training Manual (page 46). I'm not sure if it was moved or removed from the system or even there are updated training manuals. I'm using SAP B11000-2502-70004131 (SQL) and the training Manuals where downloaded from the learning hub. (screens attached).

From the HELP Portal I get the same information as on the training Manual. I'm training an internal team and I don't know what to do.

Your help will be much appreciated.

Thank you in advance

Santos Joao

entry.title: Using Ctrl + P on SAP B1 Web Browser
entry.content:
Dear  Expert,

Can we use shortcut key as Ctrl + P , Ctrl + S for Layout printing on Web browser?

Best Regards,
Peearput

entry.title: Blueprint Configuration and Questions Templates for SAP Business One
entry.content:
Dear Expert

Were can I find Templates for BluePrint Process Question and BluePrint Configuration for SAP Business One 10.

These documents are mentionned in Page 20 of TB1200 documentation.

Thanks

Boukhary

entry.title: Last Purchase price in A/P and last landed cost Query
entry.content:
Dear All,

I need a Query for the last purchase price in an A/P Invoice with  Docnum, docdate,Doccur, Itemcode,dscription,  Quantity unitprice and UOM linked to last Landed cost with Docnum, doccur,dscription, quantity, priceFOB, TtlexpndLC and Unitmsr.

 

Not with a date rage. If there is no landed cost available then the landed cost value fields can be empty. Sometimes the company receives the landed cost late. Its how they work.

The reason for the A/P invoice last purchase price is because the currency in the a/p invoice is different from the Local and system currency.

PLease help!!!

entry.title: Does SAP B1 PLD Have a Hidden Business Partner Code for Account Balance?
entry.content:
SAP B1 v10

Hello,

I'm creating a custom layout for Account Balance in SAP Business One Print Layout Designer, and I noticed that two text fields display the customer name and customer account number, but they do not reference any database field.

Here is the data for these fields:

Field 1 (Customer Name)
- Unique ID: `F_021`
- Field Type: `Text`
- Link To: (Nothing)*
- Source Type: `Free Text`

Field 2 (Customer Account Number)
- Unique ID: `F_022`
- Field Type: `Text`
- Link To: (Nothing)*
- Source Type: `Free Text`

Despite being Free Text fields, `F_021` correctly outputs the customer name, and `F_022` correctly outputs the customer account number.

My Questions:*
1. How is SAP B1 PLD retrieving this data if these fields are set as Free Text?
2. Does SAP B1 internally map `F_021` and `F_022` to the Business Partner (`OCRD.CardCode`)?
3. Is there a hidden variable or system function that automatically fills these values?
4. How can I manually reference these fields if I want to use them elsewhere?

Any insights would be greatly appreciated!

Thank you!

entry.title: Problems with the service layer in the Order POST
entry.content:
I use this endpoint
POST: http://xxxxxx:50003/b1s/v1/Orders
with this JSON

 

{

    "CardCode": "10260237-4C",

    "DocDate": "2025-03-19",

    "SalesPersonCode": -1,

    "Rounding": "tNO",

    "DocumentSubType": "bod_None",

    "Series": 13,

    "Comments": “Test",

    "DocumentLines": [

        {

            "ItemCode": "A00001",

            "PriceAfterVAT": 1785.0,

            "Quantity": 1.0,

            "TaxCode": "IVA",

            "WarehouseCode": "01"

        }

    ]

}

The response is :

{
    "error": {
        "code": -1,
        "message": {
            "lang": "en-us",
            "value": "BadFormat"
        }
    }
}
I changed the json to something simpler, but the error is the same.
{
    "CardCode": "10260237-4C",
    "DocDate": "2025-03-19",
    "DocumentLines": [
        {
            "ItemCode": "A00001",
            "Quantity": 1.0
        }
    ]
}
The product and business partner exist and are active
What's the problem? What am I missing?
